name.en: China National Center for Biotechnology Development
name.zh: 中国生物技术发展中心

description.en: The China National Center for Biotechnology Development (CNCBD) is a public institution under the Ministry of Science and Technology, responsible for biotechnology policy research, project management, and biosafety assessment. It publishes annual biotechnology development reports and manages national key biotech programs.
description.zh: 中国生物技术发展中心是科技部直属事业单位，负责生物技术政策研究、项目管理和生物安全评估。发布年度生物技术发展报告，管理国家重点生物技术计划。
